Name: Everything We Need
Notes: The official artwork for JESUS IS KING is an image of the album's vinyl disc. It features the bright blue hue that has been connected to the album throughout its promotion. This cover has an indirect correlation to some of Ye's previous work, particularly Yeezus. "AR 1331 A" is apparently the "Archer Records (AR) pressing plant code" assigned to a 1970 Detroit gospel single. However, unlike the original record, the JIK vinyl changed "45 RPM EP" to "33 RPM LP."

Name: Donda 2
Notes: This promotional cover for Donda 2 was used for the announcement of the record’s listening party at the LoanDepot Park stadium in Miami on February 22nd 2022. The artwork was posted on Kanye West’s Instagram on February 12th 2022. Much like the first promotional cover, the image shows Kanye’s Chicago South Shore childhood home burning down in a billboard, but in a dark background.

Name: True Love
Notes: This is the cover for Donda 2’s lead single, “True Love,” Kanye West’s collaboration with XXXTENTACION. As revealed by Variety, the artwork, designed by Ye, portrays X’s handwritten notes from a journal found by his mother, Cleopatra Bernard. The passionate phrases fit the theme of “True Love,” as both artists share the complications behind loving their close ones.
